indication: Rybrevant is indicated as monotherapy for treatment of adult patients with advanced NSCLC with activating EGFR Exon 20 insertion mutations, after failure of platinum-based chemotherapy.
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized amivantamab as a monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with activating EGFR Exon 20 insertion mutations, after failure of platinum-based chemotherapy.

document.name: Rybrevant (amivantamab) [product information]. EMA.
document.description: Janssen-Cilag International N.V. Rybrevant (amivantamab) [product information]. European Medicines Agency website. https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/documents/product-information/rybrevant-epar-product-information_en.pdf. Revised July 2025. Accessed September 5, 2025.
